meta.importedFrom: Unit 3 Passage 1 What can I do（互动课文教学动画）英语新教材外研版八年级下册.html

article.title: What can I do
article.summary: 面对真实问题时思考“我能做什么”，把责任转化为行动。

sentences.text: Dear Ms White,
sentences.tr: 亲爱的怀特老师：
sentences.d: 书信的标准开头称呼。

sentences.text: Thank you for making me director of our drama, Snow White.
sentences.tr: 谢谢您让我担任我们戏剧《白雪公主》的导演。
sentences.d: 'make sb + 职位'表示任命某人为...，职位前通常不加冠词。

sentences.text: It is a great honour for me.
sentences.tr: 这对我来说是巨大的荣幸。
sentences.d: It是形式主语，指代前面提到的事情。

sentences.text: I've never been a leader before.
sentences.tr: 我以前从未当过领导。
sentences.d: 表示过去的经历对现在有影响。

sentences.text: But a problem appeared during the very first task – giving out the roles.
sentences.tr: 但在第一个任务——分配角色时就出现了问题。
sentences.d: 'giving out the roles'是动名词短语作同位语，解释说明'first task'。

sentences.text: Lisa and Mary both wanted to play the princess.
sentences.tr: 丽莎和玛丽都想扮演公主。
sentences.d: 'play the princess'扮演公主角色。

sentences.text: Some of the team thought Mary was better.
sentences.tr: 团队里的一些人认为玛丽更好。
sentences.d: 省略了引导词that的宾语从句。

sentences.text: The others went with Lisa.
sentences.tr: 其他人支持丽莎。
sentences.d: 在这里表示支持、同意某人的选择。

sentences.text: Everyone looked at me and expected me to decide.
sentences.tr: 大家都看着我，指望我做决定。
sentences.d: 期望某人做某事。

sentences.text: But I just froze.
sentences.tr: 但我却愣住了。
sentences.d: froze是freeze的过去式，意为呆住、僵住。

sentences.text: Actually, I thought Mary was better, too.
sentences.tr: 其实，我也觉得玛丽更好。
sentences.g: 副词 + 主句 + 宾语从句
sentences.d: Actually表示实际上，用于修正或补充信息。

sentences.text: But what if I was wrong?
sentences.tr: 但是如果我错了怎么办？
sentences.d: 要是...会怎么样？用于提出假设。

sentences.text: What if I hurt Lisa's feelings?
sentences.tr: 如果我伤害了丽莎的感情怎么办？
sentences.d: 用于提出担忧。

sentences.text: My silence made Lisa angry.
sentences.tr: 我的沉默让丽莎生气了。
sentences.d: 使某人处于某种状态。

sentences.text: "I'm out!" she shouted and stormed off.
sentences.tr: “我不干了！”她大喊着冲了出去。
sentences.g: 直接引语 + 并列谓语
sentences.d: storm off 气冲冲地离开。

sentences.text: Then the whole team was silent.
sentences.tr: 然后整个团队都沉默了。
sentences.d: silent是形容词，表示沉默的。

sentences.text: My first day as a leader was awful!
sentences.tr: 我当领导的第一天真是糟透了！
sentences.d: as a leader作为领导。

sentences.text: What should I do?
sentences.tr: 我该怎么办？
sentences.d: 寻求建议。

sentences.text: Could you please advise me?
sentences.tr: 你能给我一些建议吗？
sentences.d: 委婉地请求建议。

sentences.text: Yours, Tony
sentences.tr: 你的，托尼
sentences.d: 非正式信件常用落款。

sentences.text: Dear Tony,
sentences.tr: 亲爱的托尼：

sentences.text: I completely understand your difficulties.
sentences.tr: 我完全理解你的困难。
sentences.d: completely修饰understand。

sentences.text: Sometimes good teamwork is hard to achieve!
sentences.tr: 有时候良好的团队合作很难实现！
sentences.d: 不定式作状语修饰形容词。

sentences.text: So the leader should take responsibility in times of disagreement.
sentences.tr: 所以在发生分歧时，领导者应该承担责任。
sentences.g: 情态动词 + 动词短语
sentences.d: take responsibility 承担责任；in times of 在...时候。

sentences.text: Here is my advice:
sentences.tr: 这是我的建议：
sentences.d: Here位于句首，句子完全倒装。

sentences.text: First, you should discuss the matter with Lisa.
sentences.tr: 首先，你应该和丽莎讨论这件事。
sentences.d: 与某人讨论某事。

sentences.text: Why does she want to play Snow White?
sentences.tr: 她为什么想演白雪公主？
sentences.d: want to do sth 想要做某事。

sentences.text: What are her strengths and weaknesses?
sentences.tr: 她的优点和缺点是什么？
sentences.d: strengths and weaknesses 优缺点。

sentences.text: You should work with her to find out.
sentences.tr: 你应该和她一起找出答案。
sentences.d: 与某人合作/共事。

sentences.text: Then, why not have Lisa and Mary both try two roles?
sentences.tr: 然后，为什么不让丽莎和玛丽都试演两个角色呢？
sentences.d: 为什么不做...？表示建议。have sb do sth 让某人做某事。

sentences.text: For example, Snow White and the queen.
sentences.tr: 例如，白雪公主和王后。
sentences.d: 补充完整为：Try the roles of Snow White and the queen。

sentences.text: All the team members can vote for the most suitable person for each role.
sentences.tr: 所有团队成员可以为每个角色投票选出最合适的人选。
sentences.d: 投票支持...；suitable for 适合...

sentences.text: Remember: you're the director, but you don't have to deal with all the problems yourself.
sentences.tr: 记住：你是导演，但你不必独自处理所有问题。
sentences.d: 不必；deal with 处理；yourself反身代词作同位语强调。

sentences.text: You have a whole team, so ask them, too!
sentences.tr: 你有一个完整的团队，所以也要问问他们！
sentences.d: ask them 向他们咨询/求助。

sentences.text: I hope my advice is wonderful.
sentences.tr: 希望我的建议很棒。
sentences.d: 省略that的宾语从句。

sentences.text: Best wishes, Ms White
sentences.tr: 最美好的祝愿，怀特老师
sentences.d: 常用祝福语。

readingQuestions.stem: Why did Tony feel it was a great honour?
options: A. Because he played the prince.
B. Because he was made the director of the drama.
C. Because he won a prize.
D. Because he wrote the play.
readingQuestions.answer: B. Because he was made the director of the drama.
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文章第一段提到 'Thank you for making me director of our drama... It is a great honour for me.'，因此选B。

readingQuestions.stem: What was the problem during the first task?
options: A. No one wanted to play Snow White.
B. Tony didn't know the story.
C. Two girls wanted the same role.
D. The teacher was angry.
readingQuestions.answer: C. Two girls wanted the same role.
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文中提到 'Lisa and Mary both wanted to play the princess.'，即两个女孩都想演同一个角色，选C。

readingQuestions.stem: How did Tony react when everyone looked at him?
options: A. He chose Mary immediately.
B. He chose Lisa immediately.
C. He asked the teacher for help.
D. He froze and couldn't decide.
readingQuestions.answer: D. He froze and couldn't decide.
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文中提到 'But I just froze.'，说明他愣住了，没能做出决定，选D。

readingQuestions.stem: What is Ms White's advice about choosing the role?
options: A. Tony should choose the one he likes.
B. Let the team vote after they try the roles.
C. Let the teacher decide.
D. Cancel the play.
readingQuestions.answer: B. Let the team vote after they try the roles.
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: Ms White建议 'All the team members can vote for the most suitable person for each role.'，即试演后投票决定，选B。

readingQuestions.stem: What does Ms White mean by 'you don't have to deal with all the problems yourself'?
options: A. Tony should quit.
B. Tony should ask his parents.
C. Tony should rely on his team.
D. Tony should ignore the problems.
readingQuestions.answer: C. Tony should rely on his team.
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 后文提到 'You have a whole team, so ask them, too!'，意在告诉Tony要依靠团队，选C。

ms.meaningZh: 女士(用于婚姻状况不明或不愿提及的女子姓名前)
